categories.name: Economy
categories.description: Skills related to buying, trading, purchasing, selling, and managing in-game currency and shop interactions.

categories.name: Combat
categories.description: Skills for engaging enemies, defending, using abilities, and managing combat flow.

categories.name: Navigation
categories.description: Skills for moving through the game world, using maps, fast travel, and exploring areas.

categories.name: Inventory
categories.description: Skills for managing items, equipment, consumables, and the player's inventory state.

categories.name: Crafting
categories.description: Skills for creating items, gathering materials, upgrading equipment, and using crafting systems.

skills.name: Buy Item
skills.description: Navigates to a shop or merchant UI and purchases a specified item by name. Handles item search, quantity selection, and purchase confirmation.

preconditions.description: A shop or merchant dialog must be active on screen
Player gold must be >= item cost
Player inventory must have at least one free slot

success: Gold balance decreases by item cost

observations.name: shop_ui_state
observations.description: Current state of the shop/merchant UI

observations.name: item_list
observations.description: Visible list of items available for purchase

observations.name: player_gold
observations.description: Current gold balance shown in UI

failure_modes.recovery: Scroll through shop list and retry search; if still missing, log and abort
Abort purchase and emit low_gold flag for parent task to handle
Trigger drop_item skill for lowest-value item, then retry
Escape to known state and re-invoke open_shop skill
Wait 500ms and retry click on confirm button up to 3 times

skills.name: Sell Item
skills.description: Locates a specified item in the player inventory within a shop context and sells it for gold. Handles quantity negotiation and sell confirmation.

preconditions.description: A shop or merchant dialog must be active and in sell mode
The target item must be present in player inventory

success: Gold balance increases by sale amount

observations.name: inventory_ui_state
observations.description: Current inventory panel within the shop sell screen

observations.name: player_gold
observations.description: Current gold balance

observations.name: item_sell_price
observations.description: Listed sell price of the target item

failure_modes.recovery: Abort and emit missing_item flag; do not retry
Look for sell tab in shop UI and click it; retry up to 2 times
Abort sale and emit low_price_warning artifact
Wait 500ms and retry confirm click up to 3 times
Escape to known state and re-invoke open_shop skill

skills.name: Haggle Price
skills.description: Attempts to negotiate a lower price on a shop item using available dialogue or barter options. Uses persuasion or charisma-based UI flows if present.

preconditions.description: Merchant dialog is active
A bargain/haggle button or dialogue node is visible

success: Item price visibly reduced in UI
Dialogue confirms a deal was struck

observations.name: dialogue_options
observations.description: Visible merchant dialogue choices

observations.name: item_base_price
observations.description: Original listed price before haggling

observations.name: player_charisma_stat
observations.description: Player charisma/speech stat if visible

failure_modes.recovery: Skip haggle, proceed with buy_item at base price
Accept base price or abort; log refusal for reputation tracking
Force escape from dialogue and flag for human review
Log failed check and fall back to base price purchase
Escape to known state via ESC key sequence

skills.name: Check Gold Balance
skills.description: Reads and returns the player's current currency balance from the HUD or inventory screen. Used as a precondition check before purchase actions.

preconditions.description: HUD or inventory screen showing currency is accessible

success: Gold value successfully parsed from UI

observations.name: hud_currency_region
observations.description: Region of HUD where currency is displayed

observations.name: inventory_currency_field
observations.description: Currency field if inventory is open

failure_modes.recovery: Open inventory screen and retry OCR on currency field
Retry OCR up to 3 times with region adjustment
Use goal_params.currency_type to disambiguate; log ambiguity
Move camera or close blocking menu and retry
Reset known UI layout hints and re-scan full screen

skills.name: Open Shop
skills.description: Locates and interacts with a merchant or shop NPC to open the trading interface. Handles NPC targeting, dialogue initiation, and shop screen navigation.

preconditions.description: A merchant NPC or shop object is within interaction range
Player is not currently in a combat state

success: Shop UI is visible and interactive

observations.name: nearby_npc_list
observations.description: Names/labels of NPCs detected near the player

observations.name: interact_prompt
observations.description: On-screen interact prompt if merchant is targeted

observations.name: minimap_state
observations.description: Minimap showing nearby merchant icons

failure_modes.recovery: Navigate to last known merchant location and retry
Move closer to merchant and re-check interact prompt
Escape dialogue and re-target merchant; look for trade option explicitly
Disengage and abort; emit hostile_merchant flag
Log mismatch and continue with available shop or seek correct merchant

skills.name: Browse Shop Inventory
skills.description: Scrolls through and reads all items available in an open shop, returning a structured list of items, quantities, and prices for downstream decision-making.

preconditions.description: Shop UI must already be open

success: All visible shop items read and catalogued
End of item list reached or scroll limit hit

observations.name: shop_item_list_region
observations.description: Scrollable list of items in shop

observations.name: scroll_position_indicator
observations.description: Scroll bar or page indicator in shop

failure_modes.recovery: Try alternative scroll method (keyboard arrows vs mouse wheel)
Zoom into item region and retry OCR
Escape to known state and re-invoke open_shop
Cap scroll at max_steps and emit partial_catalogue flag
Emit empty_shop artifact and abort gracefully

skills.name: Basic Attack
skills.description: Executes the primary attack action against a targeted enemy. Handles target lock-on, attack timing, and single-hit or combo initiation.

preconditions.description: An enemy is present and combat is active
At least one enemy is within attack range and targeted
Player HP > 0

success: Hit confirmation visual or audio cue observed

observations.name: enemy_position
observations.description: Screen position and bounding box of targeted enemy

observations.name: player_stamina
observations.description: Current stamina/action points

observations.name: weapon_in_hand
observations.description: Currently equipped weapon name

failure_modes.recovery: Reposition and retry; check if enemy is moving erratically
Wait for stamina regen or dodge to safe distance
Re-acquire target using target_enemy skill
Switch attack type or wait for enemy guard to drop
Reset combat state and re-evaluate action

skills.name: Dodge Roll
skills.description: Performs an evasive dodge or roll in a specified direction to avoid incoming enemy attacks. Relies on attack timing cues and i-frame windows.

preconditions.description: Combat is active
Player HP > 0
Stamina >= dodge cost

success: Dodge animation completes without taking damage
Player position changed in direction of dodge

observations.name: enemy_attack_animation
observations.description: Enemy wind-up or attack telegraph visual

observations.name: player_stamina
observations.description: Current stamina value

observations.name: player_position
observations.description: Current player world position

failure_modes.recovery: Log timing offset and adjust trigger threshold for next attempt
Log timing offset; if HP critical, trigger flee_combat
Block instead if available, or flee_combat immediately
Update dodge direction heuristic; try perpendicular direction
Fall back to block_attack skill or take damage and continue

skills.name: Use Ability
skills.description: Activates a named special ability, spell, or skill from the player's ability set. Manages resource costs (mana/cooldown) and targeting before activation.

preconditions.description: Target ability is not on cooldown
Player has enough resource to cast the ability
Valid target is in ability range

observations.name: ability_bar_state
observations.description: Current state of all abilities including cooldown indicators

observations.name: player_mana
observations.description: Current mana/resource level

observations.name: enemy_state
observations.description: Enemy health and status effects

failure_modes.recovery: Select next available ability or fall back to basic_attack
Use mana potion if available or abort and wait for regen
Move closer and retry ability activation
Open settings to re-read keybinds and update ability_keybind_map in memory
Dodge or reposition and re-cast

skills.name: Flee Combat
skills.description: Disengages from an active combat encounter by running to a safe distance or zone boundary. Used as a recovery action when HP is critically low.

preconditions.description: Combat is currently active
An unobstructed path away from enemies exists

success: Combat music stops or out-of-combat UI state restored

observations.name: enemy_positions
observations.description: Positions of all active enemies on screen

observations.name: player_hp
observations.description: Current player HP

observations.name: minimap_state
observations.description: Minimap showing enemy positions and safe zones

failure_modes.recovery: Try alternate flee direction; if all blocked, switch to block_attack to buy time
Use speed-boosting consumable if available; otherwise use crowd control ability
Move to map boundary and wait for combat timeout if supported
Trigger death handling routine; emit player_death flag
Look for disengage ability or wait for enemy attack window to pass

skills.name: Block Attack
skills.description: Raises a shield or weapon to block an incoming enemy attack, reducing or negating damage. Requires timing and correct guard stance.

preconditions.description: Combat is active
Player has a blocking tool equipped
Stamina >= block cost

success: Block animation plays on enemy attack

observations.name: enemy_attack_animation
observations.description: Enemy wind-up animation frame

observations.name: player_stamina
observations.description: Current stamina

observations.name: player_guard_meter
observations.description: Guard/stability meter if present

failure_modes.recovery: Immediately dodge backward and wait for guard to recover
Update timing model and fall back to dodge_roll next attempt
Switch to dodge_roll for this attack type; update attack classification
Lower guard and immediately flee or use emergency consumable
Rotate to face attacker and retry

skills.name: Open Map
skills.description: Opens the in-game world map or minimap view using the mapped keybind or menu navigation. Confirms map is rendered before returning.

preconditions.description: Player is not in an active combat state (some games disallow map during combat)
Map feature has been unlocked in the game's progression

success: Map UI overlay is fully rendered on screen
Player position marker visible on map

observations.name: screen_state
observations.description: Full screen to detect if map is already open

observations.name: hud_elements
observations.description: Currently visible HUD elements

failure_modes.recovery: Try accessing map via pause menu navigation instead
Abort and emit map_locked flag; note in progression state
Wait 500ms and re-check; retry up to 3 times
Close current menu and retry with correct keybind
Flee combat first, then retry open_map

skills.name: Fast Travel
skills.description: Initiates fast travel to a named waypoint or location using the map or travel network. Handles map opening, waypoint selection, and travel confirmation.

preconditions.description: Fast travel feature is available
Target waypoint has been previously visited
Player is not in combat

observations.name: map_ui_state
observations.description: Current state of the map screen

observations.name: waypoint_list
observations.description: List of available fast travel destinations

failure_modes.recovery: Abort and use navigate_to_area skill to reach destination on foot
Check for travel restriction (weather, quest state) and emit restriction_flag
Search map via text search if available; scroll waypoint list
Wait additional 10s; if no response, flag for human review
Re-read location name and re-trigger fast_travel with corrected destination

skills.name: Explore Area
skills.description: Systematically explores an unknown region by moving in a coverage pattern, revealing the map and logging discovered points of interest.

preconditions.description: Player is in an open-world or explorable area
No active combat

success: Area fog of war fully cleared on minimap
All discoverable POIs within range logged

observations.name: minimap_fog_state
observations.description: Unexplored (fog) regions on the minimap

observations.name: poi_markers
observations.description: Points of interest visible on map or screen

observations.name: terrain_passability
observations.description: Passable vs impassable terrain ahead

failure_modes.recovery: Mark cell as blocked and route around; update passability map
Resolve combat then resume exploration from last position
Use screen-space landmark tracking as fallback coverage heuristic
Execute unstick routine: jump and change direction randomly for 3s
Stop at best achieved coverage and emit partial_exploration artifact

skills.name: Follow Waypoint
skills.description: Sets a waypoint on the map and follows the generated path or compass marker to reach the destination. Handles dynamic obstacles and path recalculation.

preconditions.description: A waypoint or quest marker is active on the map
A navigable path to the waypoint exists

success: Player arrives within threshold distance of waypoint
Waypoint marker disappears or changes state
Destination location name appears on screen

observations.name: compass_marker
observations.description: Compass or minimap directional marker to waypoint

observations.name: waypoint_distance
observations.description: Distance to waypoint shown in UI

observations.name: terrain_ahead
observations.description: Terrain and obstacles in movement direction

failure_modes.recovery: Reroute around obstacle; if stuck 3 times, emit path_blocked flag
Re-read waypoint position from map and update target
Resolve combat or flee then re-engage waypoint following
Recover position and recalculate path from new location
Emit waypoint_lost flag and pause for task planner to reassign

skills.name: Enter Building
skills.description: Navigates to a building entrance, triggers the door interaction, and confirms the interior zone has loaded. Handles locked doors and access requirements.

preconditions.description: Player is within interaction range of a building entrance
Building is accessible (not locked or quest-gated)

success: Loading transition or zone-change animation observed

observations.name: door_interact_prompt
observations.description: On-screen interact prompt near door

observations.name: building_label
observations.description: Building name if shown in world space

observations.name: door_state
observations.description: Whether door appears open, closed, or locked

failure_modes.recovery: Check for key in inventory or look for alternate entrance
Move closer and re-approach door from different angle
Exit and re-check building label; re-navigate to correct building
Retry transition; if repeated failure, escape to known state
Emit quest_gate flag; pause for task planner to handle prerequisite

skills.name: Equip Weapon
skills.description: Opens the equipment or inventory screen, locates a specified weapon, and equips it to the appropriate slot. Handles slot conflicts and confirmation dialogs.

preconditions.description: Target weapon exists in player inventory
Player is not in the middle of an attack animation

success: Weapon icon appears in equipment slot UI
Player character model shows new weapon
Equipment stats panel updates to reflect new weapon

observations.name: inventory_panel
observations.description: Current inventory screen showing items

observations.name: equipment_slots
observations.description: Equipment slot panel showing current gear

observations.name: item_stats_popup
observations.description: Stat comparison popup when hovering over item

failure_modes.recovery: Scroll inventory and retry search; if missing, emit item_not_found flag
Unequip current item first then re-equip target weapon
Abort and emit requirement_not_met flag with required stats
Read dialog text and confirm if safe; reject if destructive action detected
Re-open inventory and retry from item search step

skills.name: Drop Item
skills.description: Removes a specified item from the player inventory by dropping it into the game world or discarding it via the inventory UI.

preconditions.description: Target item exists in inventory
Inventory screen can be accessed

success: Drop confirmation observed (item on ground or discard animation)

observations.name: inventory_panel
observations.description: Current inventory contents

observations.name: item_quantity
observations.description: Stack size of the item to be dropped

failure_modes.recovery: Log non-droppable item and skip; try next lowest-value item
Read dialog and confirm drop; reject if wording indicates permanent loss of key item
Unequip item first then retry drop
Abort drop immediately and emit quest_item_protected flag
Reopen inventory and retry

skills.name: Inspect Item
skills.description: Opens an item's detail view in the inventory to read its full stats, description, lore, and metadata. Returns structured item data for downstream decisions.

preconditions.description: Inventory screen is currently open
Target item is present in inventory

observations.name: inventory_panel
observations.description: Inventory panel with item list

observations.name: item_detail_panel
observations.description: Detail/info panel on item hover or select

artifacts: item_data: {name, type, stats, rarity, description, value}

failure_modes.recovery: Hover over item again and wait 300ms; retry up to 3 times
Zoom screenshot region and retry OCR
Scroll inventory and research; emit not_found if absent
Read all instances and return list; flag ambiguity
Try right-click context menu to find inspect option

skills.name: Use Consumable
skills.description: Activates a consumable item (health potion, buff food, scroll) from the inventory or quick-use slot. Handles cooldown checks and effect confirmation.

preconditions.description: Target consumable is available
No active cooldown on the item type

observations.name: quickslot_bar
observations.description: Quick-use item slots on HUD

observations.name: player_hp_bar
observations.description: Current HP percentage

observations.name: buff_status_panel
observations.description: Active buffs/debuffs panel

failure_modes.recovery: Wait for cooldown or use alternate consumable type
Open inventory, assign item to quickslot, then use
Emit out_of_consumables flag; switch to alternate or buy more
Re-attempt use if still needed; check if item was consumed despite interrupt
Verify HP was already at max or buff already active; log anomaly

skills.name: Sort Inventory
skills.description: Triggers the inventory auto-sort function or manually reorganises items by a given criterion (type, value, weight). Used to improve item-find speed in future skills.

preconditions.description: Inventory screen is visible

success: Items visibly reordered in inventory grid
Sort criterion reflected in item layout

observations.name: inventory_panel
observations.description: Inventory grid before sort

observations.name: sort_button
observations.description: Sort/auto-arrange button location if present

failure_modes.recovery: Attempt manual sort by dragging high-value items; emit no_auto_sort flag
Retry sort click; verify inventory actually changed
Reopen inventory and retry
Use goal_params.sort_by to select correct option from dropdown
Emit inventory_locked flag; do not modify order

skills.name: Craft Item
skills.description: Opens the crafting interface, selects a target recipe, verifies materials are available, and executes the craft. Returns the crafted item and resource delta.

preconditions.description: A crafting bench, anvil, or crafting menu is available
The target recipe is unlocked in the player's recipe book
All required materials are in inventory

observations.name: crafting_ui_state
observations.description: Current crafting screen layout

observations.name: recipe_list
observations.description: Available recipes visible in UI

observations.name: material_inventory
observations.description: Current material quantities in inventory

failure_modes.recovery: Scroll recipe list and search; if truly missing, emit recipe_not_known flag
Emit missing_materials list; trigger gather_material for each missing resource
Navigate to correct station type and retry
Wait 5s then escape; verify if item was created before retrying
Log quality outcome; retry if quality is randomised and attempt budget remains

skills.name: Gather Material
skills.description: Locates and harvests a resource node (herb, ore, wood) in the game world. Handles navigation to the node, interaction, and collection of dropped materials.

preconditions.description: Target resource is known to be nearby or shown on map
Player is not currently in combat

success: Resource node depleted or changes state

observations.name: world_resource_markers
observations.description: Resource icons on minimap or in world space

observations.name: interact_prompt
observations.description: Interaction prompt when near a resource node

observations.name: node_label
observations.description: Name of the resource node if shown in world

failure_modes.recovery: Expand search radius; check map for alternate node locations
Mark node as depleted with timestamp; seek next nearest node
Resolve or flee combat then return to gather
Re-interact with node and retry; check if partial materials were collected
Trigger drop_item for lowest-value item then retry gather

skills.name: Upgrade Equipment
skills.description: Uses a smithing, enhancement, or upgrade station to improve the stats or level of an equipped or inventoried item. Manages material cost and success probability.

preconditions.description: A smith, upgrade bench, or relevant NPC is available
Target item has available upgrade path
Required upgrade materials are in inventory

success: Item stats visibly increased in UI
Item name or tier indicator changes

observations.name: upgrade_ui_state
observations.description: Current upgrade screen

observations.name: item_upgrade_path
observations.description: Upgrade options and costs for the item

observations.name: success_chance_indicator
observations.description: Upgrade success probability if shown

failure_modes.recovery: Log failure; retry if materials allow and success chance is acceptable
Emit missing_materials list; trigger gather_material for each
Emit max_level flag; skip upgrade
Abort if below min_success_chance threshold; log and await better conditions
Emit item_destroyed flag immediately; notify task planner for re-planning

skills.name: Dismantle Item
skills.description: Breaks down an unwanted item into its component crafting materials using a dismantle, salvage, or deconstruct interface.

preconditions.description: Dismantling UI is reachable
Target item is in player inventory
Item type supports dismantling

observations.name: dismantle_ui_state
observations.description: Dismantle/salvage screen

observations.name: yield_preview
observations.description: Materials that will be yielded on dismantle

failure_modes.recovery: Log item as non-dismantleable; try sell_item instead
Abort immediately; emit quest_item_protected flag
Compare yield to expectation; log discrepancy for model update
Navigate to blacksmith or correct station type and retry
Drop lowest-value items to make space, then complete dismantle

skills.name: Combine Items
skills.description: Combines two or more inventory items according to a known recipe or by trial interaction, producing a new compound item. Used for alchemy, food, and puzzle-solving.

preconditions.description: All required component items are present
An alchemy table, cooking fire, or relevant UI is open

success: New combined item appears in inventory

observations.name: combination_ui
observations.description: Combination/alchemy interface

observations.name: ingredient_slots
observations.description: Ingredient slot positions in UI

observations.name: result_preview
observations.description: Preview of resulting item before confirming

failure_modes.recovery: Log attempted combination; emit recipe_unknown flag for learning pipeline
Log actual result vs expected; update recipe memory and emit mismatch flag
Retry drag-and-drop to slot; try alternate slot assignment order
Do not confirm combination; abort and re-check recipe
Log consumed components; emit material_loss flag; re-plan if needed
